name: Peanut-Pecan Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix butter, shortening, and peanut butter until soft and fluffy. Stir in sugars, egg, and vanilla; stir in dry ingredients; fold in pecans and chocolate pieces.
3. Drop by teaspoons onto ungreased cookie sheets about 2 inches apart. Bake in a preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until edges of cookies are lightly browned. Cool cookies for 5 minutes on the sheet before removing them and cooling them on a rack.
